name: Cross-Role-Resolution-Time (CRRT)
description: Median elapsed time required to resolve inter-agent dependencies from handshake initiation to accepted completion.
goalMapping: Measures end-to-end collaboration speed and blocked-state recovery efficiency.

escalation_policy.on_critical: Escalate dependency bottleneck to COO and Secretary for intervention.
escalation_policy.on_warning: Mark workflow at-risk and request proactive RFI closure.
